description: Audit the official US Department of Transportation (DOT) Airline Customer Service Dashboard to compare the 'Commitments for Controllable Cancellations' of American, Delta, Southwest, and Spirit airlines. Create a JSON file at ~/Documents/airline_rights_audit.json containing boolean values for 'meal_voucher', 'hotel_accommodation', and 'rebook_partner' for each airline based on the dashboard's data. Download the official 'Fly Rights' or 'Consumer Guide to Air Travel' PDF to ~/Downloads/. In Firefox, create a bookmark folder named 'Travel Policy Resources' containing bookmarks for the DOT Dashboard and the 'Tarmac Delay' consumer page.
